## [09:08 - 12:10]

to look at more deals. What does that mean? It means I'm building a team out. But look, there's no way around this regardless of what else you're doing in your life. ## [12:10 - 13:00]

I'm going to build a portfolio, first 100 units, then 1,000 units, then 10,000 units. Start thinking like that right now. If not, hey, work with somebody that is thinking like that. Partner with somebody. Ronseco is a perfect example. He had 18 units. Sold his 18 units, invested all his money with me in an 800 unit deal. He went from owning 18 units on his own where he owned 100% to investing his 400 grand in 800 units that we own and his money is going to triple in less than three years. Look outside your market when you can. When that eventually comes, you'll need a team to research deals. You'll need a team to make contact with brokers. You can't do it all.
